overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi exploration game showing a spacesuited character navigating a futuristic, neon-lit space station interior. The character explores a multi-level concourse featuring a central holographic planet display before ascending an illuminated staircase to an upper deck.

scene_state.functional_zone: space station concourse with holographic navigation display

agents.ego_description: walking slowly around the central holographic display, observing the futuristic surroundings

entered.detail: large glowing spherical hologram suspended above the central platform
raised circular metal deck with glowing red interface panels
tall industrial metal walls with green paint and geometric patterns
elevated walkway with railings visible on the upper level
glowing orange light strip running along the floor

segments.scene_description: The character explores the main concourse of a futuristic space station, walking around a large circular platform with a glowing holographic planet suspended above it. The area features green metal structures, neon floor lighting, and industrial architecture.

events.description: another spacesuited figure with red helmet comes into view standing near the staircase

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated staircase, passing another armored figure

notable_agents.action: stationary figure in blue armor with red helmet standing near the stairs

entered.detail: staircase with glowing orange step lights leading to upper level
blue fabric banner hanging from the upper structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a staircase area where another armored figure stands near the illuminated steps. The holographic planet shifts to the right side of the frame as the camera moves forward, and blue hanging banners become visible in the background.

events.description: character begins ascending the illuminated staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated stairs toward the upper deck of the station

entered.detail: metal walkway entrance at the top of the stairs
metal safety railing along the upper level edge

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the glowing staircase toward the upper level of the space station, passing metal railings and approaching the upper deck entrance. The holographic planet becomes smaller in the background as the character climbs higher.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit space station concourse that ascends from a central holographic display to an upper deck. It begins with the character navigating a circular platform beneath a glowing holographic planet, surrounded by green metal structures and industrial architecture. As the camera moves forward, the holographic planet shifts to the right of the frame and blue hanging banners emerge in the background while the character approaches another armored figure near a set of illuminated steps. The scene then shifts upward as the character climbs the glowing staircase, passing metal railings and moving toward the upper deck entrance. Finally, the holographic planet recedes and grows smaller in the distance as the character reaches the higher level of the station.
